title: Headphone with stiffening mechanism
abstract: The present invention relates to a headphone for use with an audio or mobile communication device, comprising at least one earbud, a microphone, and a wire. The headphone further comprises a stiffening mechanism, which is constructed to be arranged in an actuated state, in which the stiffening mechanism has a first bending stiffness and in which the stiffening mechanism is in a stiff configuration, and in a relaxed state, in which the stiffening mechanism has a second bending stiffness and in which the stiffening mechanism is in a free-hanging configuration. The first bending stiffness is larger than the second bending stiffness. The invention further relates to a method for communicating by means of a headphone, which comprises the steps of arranging, at the onset of communication, a stiffening mechanism of the headphone in an actuated state, in order to position a microphone of the headphone in front of a mouth of the user, and arranging, at the end of communication, the stiffening mechanism in a relaxed state, in order to freely suspend the microphone.
claims:
Claims 1. Headphone for use with an audio or mobile communication device, comprising: at least one earbud, a microphone, and a wire, which extends between the earbud and the microphone, wherein the wire is configured to transmit an electric signal between them, characterized in that, the headphone further comprises a stiffening mechanism, which in an axial direction extends between the earbud and the microphone and which is constructed to be arranged in: â¢ an actuated state, in which the stiffening mechanism has a first bending stiffness and in which the stiffening mechanism is in a stiff configuration, and â¢ a relaxed state, in which the stiffening mechanism has a second bending stiffness and in which the stiffening mechanism is in a free-hanging configuration, wherein the first bending stiffness is larger than the second bending stiffness. 2. Headphone according to claim 1 , wherein the stiffening mechanism comprises multiple beads, a tensioning cable and a tensioner, wherein the beads are arranged in series in the axial direction of the stiffening mechanism, wherein a first end of the tensioning cable is connected to the tensioner and wherein an opposing second end of the tensioning cable is connected to a furthest one of the beads, seen from the tensioner, wherein the tensioner is, in the actuated state of the stiffening mechanism, configured to apply a pulling force on the first end of the tensioning cable, in order to press the beads against each other in the axial direction, and wherein the tensioner is, in the relaxed state of the stiffening mechanism, configured to freely suspend the first end of the tensioning cable, in order to freely hang the beads on the tensioning cable. 3. Headphone according to claim 2, wherein each of the beads comprises a first opening, wherein the first openings are aligned end-to-end, thereby forming a first channel through the beads in the axial direction, and 

 wherein the tensioning cable extends through the first channel 4. Headphone according to claim 3, wherein the first openings are offset with respect to a centreline of the beads. 5. Headphone according to any of the claims 2 - 4, wherein each of the beads comprises a second opening, wherein the second openings are arranged end-to-end, thereby forming a second channel through the beads in the axial direction, and wherein the wire extends through the second channel. 6. Headphone according to claim 5, wherein the second openings are concentric with respect to the centreline of the beads. 7. Headphone according to any of the claims 2 - 6, wherein the tensioner comprises a pulley and an actuating mechanism, connected to the pulley, wherein the first end of the tensioning cable is arranged at least partially on the pulley, wherein the actuating mechanism is configured to rotate the pulley between a wound position and an unwound position, wherein: in the wound position of the pulley, the pulley is configured to apply a pulling force on the tensioning cable and the stiffening mechanism is arranged in the actuated state, and in the unwound position of the pulley, the pulley is configured to freely suspend the tensioning cable and the stiffening mechanism is arranged in the relaxed state. 8. Headphone according to any of the claims 2 - 6, wherein the tensioner comprises a two-position switch mechanism, wherein the first end of the tensioning cable is connected to the switch mechanism, wherein the switch mechanism is configured to be arranged in a first position and in a second position, wherein: in the first position of the switch mechanism, the switch mechanism is configured to freely suspend the tensioning cable and the stiffening mechanism is arranged in the relaxed state, and 

 in the second position of the switch mechanism, the switch mechanism is configured order to apply a pulling force on the tensioning cable and the stiffening mechanism is arranged in the actuated state. 9. Headphone according to any of the claims 2 - 6, wherein the tensioner comprises a spring-loaded friction element and a housing with an opening therein, wherein the first end of the tensioning cable extends through the opening, and wherein the spring-loaded friction element is configured to be arranged in a clamping position and a released position, wherein: in the clamped position of the spring-loaded friction element, the spring- loaded friction element is configured to apply a frictional clamping force between the first end of the tensioning cable and the housing, in order to maintain the pulling force in the tensioning cable and the stiffening mechanism is arranged in the actuated state, and in the released position of the spring-loaded friction element, the spring- loaded friction element is configured to freely suspend the tensioning cable and the stiffening mechanism is arranged in the relaxed state. 10. Headphone according to any of the claims 2 - 9, wherein the beads are provided as ball beads and cylindrical beads, which are alternatingly arranged along the axial direction. 11. Headphone according to claim 1 , wherein the stiffening mechanism comprises at least one inflatable pneumatic element to hold pressurized gas, which is configured to be in: an inflated condition, in which a gas pressure in the pneumatic element is substantially larger than an ambient pressure, corresponding to the actuated state of the stiffening mechanism, and a deflated condition, in which the gas pressure in the pneumatic element is the same as the ambient pressure, corresponding to the relaxed state of the stiffening mechanism. 12. Headphone according to claim 1 , wherein the stiffening mechanism comprises a plurality of magnetic elements, which are: in the actuated state of the stiffening mechanism, configured to apply a magnetic force between them, and 

 in the relaxed state of the stiffening mechanism, configured to prevent the presence of a magnetic force between them. 13. Headphone according to claim 1 , wherein the stiffening mechanism comprises a flexible element which has a centreline that extends in an axial direction, wherein the flexible element comprises: a plurality of first channels which extend in the axial direction and which are arranged offset with respect to the centreline, at least one tensioning cable, which is arranged in one of the first channels, and a second channel which extends in the axial direction and which is arranged concentric with respect to the centreline. 14. Headphone according to any of the preceding claims, further comprising a control unit, which is configured to control the stiffening mechanism. 15. Headphone according to claim 14, wherein the control unit comprises a wireless communication unit, which is configured to receive an actuation signal from an audio or mobile communication device, wherein the control unit is configured to control the stiffening mechanism on the basis of the received actuation signal. 16. Headphone according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the wire further extends from the microphone towards a plug, wherein the headphone is, by means of the plug, configured to be connected to an audio or mobile communication device. 17. Headphone according to any of the claims 1 - 14, further comprising a second wire, which extends from the earbud towards a plug, wherein the headphone is, by means of the plug, configured to be connected to an audio or mobile communication device. 18. Method for communicating by means of a headphone according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the method comprises the steps of: arranging an earbud of the headphone in an ear of a user, connecting the headphone to a communication device, arranging, at the onset of communication, a stiffening mechanism of the headphone in an actuated state, in order to allow positioning of a microphone of the headphone in front of a mouth of the user, and 

 arranging, at the end of communication, the stiffening mechanism in a relaxed state, in order to freely suspend the microphone from the earbud.
